prompt: Soft and realistic vertical indoor portrait in a bright and transparent natural light lifestyle photography style. A 20-year-old adult woman sitting on the floor leaning against a low bed or padded seat in a peaceful minimalist room. Slightly to the right, leaning back against a white pillow or the edge of a sofa, her body extending diagonally from the lower-left foreground to the right side of the screen. A quiet, gentle, slightly dreamy expression, looking directly at the camera. Character: extremely long dark brown straight hair with warm golden-brown tips, middle-parted, falling smoothly over the shoulders and chest. Soft and exquisite makeup: thick eyeliner, long lashes, light peach blush, glowing fair skin, shiny light pink lips. Relaxed and elegant posture—one hand near the hair or cheek; the other resting gently on the knee. Styling: A dignified and soft boudoir portrait composition. Dark brown straight hair naturally covers the bare shoulders and upper body. Soft, matte, lightweight white draping fabric surrounds the knees, refined and sophisticated—focusing on natural light, a calm atmosphere, posture, and fabric texture. Scene: Bright minimalist room. Behind her: a large window with sheer white tulle curtains, overexposed sunlight pouring in, light blue-white walls. Left: a small table with a vintage-style metal fan. Background: a low wooden bookshelf with stacked books, a small camera or decorative items, a woven storage basket, and a visible black book cover with bold white text. Right foreground: soft-focus blurred checkered blanket or fabric edge—adding depth and a framing effect. Lighting and Tone: High-key diffused natural light from the window—soft halos on the face, hair, shoulders, arms, white fabric, and floor. Shallow depth of field, creamy highlights, gentle shadows, clean pastel tones. Color palette: bright whites, light blue walls, warm skin tones, dark brown hair, light wood furniture, understated grey flooring, and soft beige accents. Style: Realistic indoor natural light portrait photography, bright minimalist room, relaxed sitting posture, dark long straight hair, white draping fabric, soft dreamy expression, tulle curtains, vintage fan, background bookshelf, bright high-key lighting, shallow depth of field, vertical format, high detail. No watermarks, no logos, no cartoon feel, no strong flash, no deformed anatomy, no extra people, no cluttered elements, no explicit nudity.
